info.name: ReviewFlow — Unified Complete Collection + Security Hardening
info.description: Self-contained unified collection: Complete test suite with multi-user testing + 524 comprehensive tests (all 93 endpoints) + 50+ security hardening tests. All variables embedded. No external environment needed.

item.name: 00_SETUP
item.description: Collection-level setup: login all 4 roles and cache tokens

item.name: 01_AUTH
item.description: Authentication module: login, logout, refresh, session management (30+ tests)

exec: pm.test('Status 200', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200));pm.test('Response has token', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().token).to.exist);pm.test('User role is SYSTEM_ADMIN', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().user.role).to.equal('SYSTEM_ADMIN'));pm.environment.set('systemAdminToken', pm.response.json().token);

pm.test('Status 200', () => pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200));pm.test('Response has user ID', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().id).to.exist);pm.test('Response has email', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().email).to.exist);

item.name: SEC-Auth-04: Role info visible to authenticated user
02_USERS
item.description: User management: CRUD, role changes, bulk operations (37+ tests)

exec: pm.test('Status 201 or 200', () => pm.expect([200, 201]).to.include(pm.response.code));pm.test('Response indicates created count', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().createdCount || pm.response.json().count).to.be.greaterThan(0));
pm.test('Status ok or already deactivated', () => pm.expect([200, 204, 409]).to.include(pm.response.code));

item.name: EC-Users-06: Whitespace in email local part
EC-Users-07: Update same user twice rapidly
EC-Users-08: Null values in optional fields

exec: pm.test('No password in response', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().password).to.be.undefined);pm.test('No password hash', () => pm.expect(JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.not.include('password'));

item.name: SEC-Users-02: Students cannot list all users
SEC-Users-03: Students cannot modify other users

item.name: SEC-Courses-05: Instructor cant create as ADMIN
04_ASSIGNMENTS
item.description: Assignment management: state transitions, rubric criteria, bulk ops (60+ tests)

item.name: 05_TEAMS
item.description: Team management: creation, memberships, locking, bulk ops (50+ tests)

item.name: 06_SUBMISSIONS
item.description: Submission handling: file uploads, versioning, bulk ops (40+ tests)

item.name: 07_EVALUATIONS
item.description: Evaluation/grading: score calculation, PDF generation, bulk publish (55+ tests)

item.name: 08_EXTENSIONS
item.description: Assignment extensions: request, approve, deny (25+ tests)

item.name: 10_NOTIFICATIONS
item.description: User notifications: list, mark-read, delete, filtering (40+ tests)

item.name: 11_EXPORT
item.description: Grade export: CSV, XLSX, JSON formats, bulk export (30+ tests)

item.name: 12_PREVIEW
item.description: File preview: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, images, presigned URLs (20+ tests)

item.name: 13_ADMINSTATS
item.description: Admin stats: system metrics, aggregates, performance (20+ tests)

item.name: 14_SYSTEMADMIN
item.description: System admin operations: force logout, unlock, cache ops (45+ tests)

item.name: 15_CLEANUP
item.description: Final cleanup: delete all 1000+ dynamic records, verify seed data

item.name: 16 — SECURITY HARDENING
item.description: Security hardening tests: rate limiting, injection, XSS, CSRF, header validation, auth boundary conditions

item.name: 16.01 ✓ Rate Limiting — Login attempts (5+ to trigger 429)

exec: // After 5 failed attempts from same IP, 6th should get 429

item.name: 16.02 ✗ Rate Limiting — Invalid token attempts (20+ to trigger 429)

exec: // Rapid invalid token requests should trigger rate limit
pm.test('Rate limiting or auth rejection', () => pm.expect([401, 429]).to.include(pm.response.code));
